Descriptor Engine Configuration

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x220
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Descriptor engine feature enables (global for all channels)

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:6] RSVD r 0x0 -
[5:2] FIFO_THRESH rw 0x8 -
[1] PREFETCH_EN rw 0x0 -
[0] DESCENG_EN rw 0x1 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

FIFO_THRESH

FIFO threshold [5:2] - prefetch threshold (4 bits)

PREFETCH_EN

Prefetch enable - enable descriptor prefetch

DESCENG_EN

Descriptor engine enable - master enable
